variants: Manoj Pratihar is a dedicated professional in the field of occupational therapy, where he applies his expertise to enhance the well-being of individuals. He holds a Labyrinth Cartographer Accreditation, which showcases his commitment to his profession. Manoj is also actively involved with the Cedarveil Pipeplayers, where he finds joy and camaraderie among fellow enthusiasts. His academic journey was shaped under the mentorship of Chantelle Lemoine, who guided him through his development in the field. The Magpie Arc Fund serves as his primary funding source, facilitating his ongoing research and projects.
